target.title: test(agents): use neutral tool schema fixtures
target.body:
## Summary

- Replaces real-looking tool-schema fixture names with neutral `fuzzplugin` / `mockplugin` names across the existing tests.
- Keeps behavior expectations unchanged while avoiding references to the originally reported plugin/tool name.

## Verification

- Rebased branch onto current `origin/main` at `b9dc3c38940`; pushed head `06ef86b345b75d0af8a8536c411d3384fe97f0bd`.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs $(cat /tmp/neutral-fixture-files-current.txt)`: passed, 6 routed shards.
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check $(cat /tmp/neutral-fixture-files-current.txt)`: passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs $(cat /tmp/neutral-fixture-files-current.txt)`: passed.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`: passed.
- `node scripts/changed-lanes.mjs --json`: selected only `coreTests` and `extensionTests`.
- `node scripts/check-changed.mjs --dry-run`: selected only `coreTests` and `extensionTests`.
- Touched-file scrub found no reported private plugin/tool name or private path/network literals.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`: clean, no accepted/actionable findings.
- CI boundary: full CI on this head reports `check-dependencies`, `check-test-types`, and `checks-node-agentic-agents-core` failures, but the same three jobs failed on `main` run `26716712965` at `b9dc3c38940`, and latest `main` run `26716918236` at `63de51ab963` is also failing `check-dependencies` and `check-test-types`. The failing logs are outside this test-only diff (`ui/src/ui/browser-redact.ts`, `ui/src/ui/control-ui-vite-config.node.test.ts`, and `src/agents/bash-tools*.test.ts`).

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: test fixtures no longer use a real-looking plugin/tool name while preserving coverage for malformed runtime tool schemas and doctor/plugin warnings.

Real environment tested: local linked gwt worktree with the exact changed test files routed through the repo Vitest wrapper.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs $(cat /tmp/neutral-fixture-files-current.txt)`; `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check $(cat /tmp/neutral-fixture-files-current.txt)`; `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs $(cat /tmp/neutral-fixture-files-current.txt)`; `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`; `node scripts/changed-lanes.mjs --json`; `node scripts/check-changed.mjs --dry-run`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`.

Evidence after fix: all changed test files pass through focused routed Vitest, formatting, lint, diff check, and autoreview.

Observed result after fix: the diff remains test-only, +122/-122 across 14 files, with neutral fixture names only.

What was not tested: no clean broad `pnpm check:changed`; current `main` CI is red in unrelated dependency/type/agents-core jobs outside this test-only fixture scrub.
target.author: vincentkoc
